name: pandoc-manuscript-tools
description: Local VS Code helpers for Pandoc Markdown labels, cross references, math hovers, and outline symbols.

scripts.check: node --check src/extension.js && node --check src/parser.js && node --check scripts/profile-test-md.js
scripts.package:vsix: npm run check && npm run bundle && npm run check:bundle && vsce package
scripts.publish:marketplace: npm run check && npm run bundle && npm run check:bundle && vsce publish
scripts.publish:patch: npm run check && npm run bundle && npm run check:bundle && vsce publish patch

commands.title: Pandoc Manuscript Tools: Build DOCX and Open in Word

pandocManuscriptTools.enableDiagnostics.description: Report undefined Pandoc cross references and duplicate labels in open Markdown documents.

pandocManuscriptTools.includeWorkspaceRe.description: Index Markdown files in the current workspace when resolving definitions and references.

pandocManuscriptTools.includeLabelSymbol.description: Add equation, figure, and table labels as nested outline symbols below their nearest heading.
